findings.evidence: Roadmap Layer 2 is `TauCetiRoadmap/Multiquadratic/README.md:111-116` for `Cl(K)/Cl(K)²`; the diff also changes `code/TauCeti/FieldTheory/SquareClassGroup.lean:34-48`, an existing square-class API used by Layer 0.
findings.fix: Split the SquareClassGroup refactor into a separate PR, or leave the existing square-class implementation untouched here and keep this PR focused on `Cl/Cl²`.
findings.issue: The PR changes the existing Layer 0 square-class group implementation to be an alias for the new generic `elementaryTwoQuotient`, while also adding the Layer 2 class-group quotient.

summary: The class-group elementary-2 quotient itself is on the Multiquadratic Layer 2 roadmap, but this PR also bundles a refactor of the existing square-class group API. That makes the PR more than one topic under this rubric.
